summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Lunet Labz landing page. All 10 backend pytest tests pass (projects list, waitlist create/duplicate/invalid/count). Frontend renders cleanly: 3D ghost canvas (R3F), waitlist form submission with success and duplicate toasts, all 6 project cards (ghostpad, lanternfm, atlas-cli, lumenboard, tinybrew, mothlamp), Features/HowItWorks/Coffee/Footer sections all present. No R3F runtime crashes — visual-edits disable in craco.config.js is effective.

minor.issue: Pydantic EmailStr rejects RFC reserved TLDs like '.test' and '.local' with 422. Not a bug per se, but worth noting for users who type fake emails. Real users typing genuine emails are unaffected.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo (doc['created_at'].isoformat()) but the Pydantic model returns it as datetime — consistent at the API surface, just noting the type drift between DB and response.
Coffee section 'Buy us a coffee' link href='#' is intentional per problem statement — not flagged.
Featured project (ghostpad) is rendered first in a full-width row by Projects.jsx — non-featured projects render in 2-col grid. Visually clean.
Consider adding rate-limiting on POST /api/waitlist to prevent abuse (not in current scope).
seed_data_creation: Waitlist DB now contains several TEST_ entries (unique UUID-prefixed emails @example.com) from the test runs. Safe to leave; cleanup not required for this app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use @example.com (NOT @example.test or @lunet.test) for waitlist email tests — Pydantic EmailStr rejects RFC-reserved TLDs. Each waitlist email must be unique (UUID prefix). Backend live at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. Frontend Ghost3D canvas has data-testid='hero-ghost-canvas'. Project cards use data-testid='project-card-<id>'.
rca of the issue: n/a — no production bugs found. Initial test failures were due to test data using reserved '.test' TLD which Pydantic EmailStr rejects (correct behavior). Fixed by switching tests to @example.com.
